narrative:
Madison-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 440 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.5%, a clear Republican lean of 7.7 percentage points.
